plugins.name: spanner-security
plugins.description: Spanner PD's secure-by-default engineering standard + a pre-commit/push secret gate — GitHub, Supabase, and Cloudflare rules plus the three-layer compliance framework. Applies automatically when building, committing, or pushing anything touching code, data, auth, or deployment.

plugins.name: spanner-toolkit
plugins.description: Spanner's working skill set for Claude Code — project setup, Apps Script/clasp guardrails for the planner fleet, SpannerOS schema migrations and CRUD scaffolding, Torque product-UI language, design-review loop, operating model, internal-portal deploy, domain/SSL/DNS, weekly digest, matrix task sync, and meeting notes (Granola/Zoom/Otter → Notion, with optional screenshot enrichment). Brings terminal Claude Code to parity with the org skill library.

plugins.name: spanner-project-launch
plugins.description: Automates the Spanner BD-to-PD Launch Checklist for new projects across Notion, Google Drive, Slack, Google Calendar, and Gmail — creates the Project Tracker entry, planner (via template script), exec summary deck (via Planner → Generate Exec Summary Deck), project folders, channels, meetings, and email drafts, logs every run to the Project Launch Log sheet, then hands back a manual punch list.
